violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Cinnamon rolls in open/uncover bag in walk in freezer. -Top shelf cases below walk in freezer fans have some ice build up, are not well protected from fans. -Bag of dry macaroni stored below drain lines in basement dry storage room.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -In 2 door glass cooler ground sausage and pancake batter made yesterday were not date marked. -Ranch in walk in cooler was mis-dated 03/06, had been made 4/6.*COS-fixed date mark immediately.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Walk in cooler: Red chili dated 3/29 and chocolate pudding dated 3/08. *Directed to dispose of products.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Lid/container of rib rub seasoning with build up of dust/debris. -Some splatter at interior surfaces of both microwaves. -Heavy grease/debris build up at sides of fryers. -Frost/debris build up at interior of chest freezer next to hot hold. -Limescale/debris/residue at interior surfaces of all hot wells. -Crumb debris at top side edge surfaces of both make tables.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. -Plates and other clean dishes at bottom shelf near hand sink are not inverted/protected from contamination.

Handwashing lavatories. — ---Kitchen handsink does not have splash gaurd between the hand sink and the shelf used for clean dishes and food storage.--Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Facility added scoop ice cream/ shake blender to front of house server area. Only hand sink available is in back area of kitchen.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Acoustic ceiling tiles at server prep station.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Syrup/spill below soda bibs in basement.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Dish pit has pitted, unsealed concrete. -Damaged/chipped floor tiles throughout kitchen/prep areas. -Basement heating duct has sheet metal panel propped in place with old skillets.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Gravy found in hot hold at 9am with temperature of 97F at center and 145 at edges. *Staff stated product was heated in microwave to minimum of 165f at 730am but had not preheated table. Directed staff return gravy to microwave-reheated while on-site.
General employee cleanliness. — --Soapy water bucket used for washing hands at server station before putting on gloves for buttering toast/breads.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. -Cook with beard is not wearing a beard net.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Walk in cooler catch tray has dried food spill. -Frost build up at interiors of 2 upright freezers near oven. -Grease build up at sides of fryers. -Residue at edges and underside of handles of left prep cooler door. -Grease residue at bottom exterior edge/vent cover of right side prep table.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Water and cloths at floor in dish pit room. -No drain cover at dish pit floor drain. -Frost build up at ceiling and floors of walk in freezer. -Spill below soda bibs. -Basement restroom needs deep clean.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)

Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)

Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
